articles.author: Ellie Borst
articles.title: Greens disavowed RFK Jr. Now they’re rethinking his MAHA movement - Politico
articles.description: Environmental groups publicly rejected Robert F. Kennedy Jr. during his presidential run. Now, some are quietly locking arms with the "Make America Healthy Again" movement the longtime environmental attorney founded.
articles.content:
We get a lot of airtime, Faber said.
